supportTickets.subject: Login not working
supportTickets.description: Customer cannot access their account after password reset. They receive a generic error on login.

messages.author: Customer
messages.content: The reset link keeps failing and I cannot sign in.

messages.author: Agent
messages.content: Checked the reset flow; looks like a token expiry issue. Need to patch the login handler.

supportTickets.subject: Invoice mismatch
supportTickets.description: Invoice total does not match the contract price. Customer requests updated invoice and correction.

messages.author: Customer
messages.content: The total on invoice #118 is higher than expected.

messages.author: Agent
messages.content: Reviewing line items and contract terms now.

supportTickets.subject: Website update request
supportTickets.description: Customer requested a homepage hero image update and content tweak, completed successfully.

messages.author: Customer
messages.content: Please update the hero image and CTA text to match new branding.

messages.author: Agent
messages.content: Implemented the requested content changes and published the page.

supportTickets.subject: Broken form submission
supportTickets.description: Form submissions are failing with a 500 error. Customer needs urgent fix for lead capture.

messages.author: Customer
messages.content: My form is returning an error after submit and leads are not getting captured.

messages.author: Agent
messages.content: Investigating server error logs and validation rules.
